hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *backend/*.py) if [ -f backend/pyproject.toml ]; then (cd backend && uv run ruff format "$f" && uv run pytest -q 2>&1 | tail -20); else echo 'post-edit hook: no backend/pyproject.toml yet -> skip'; fi ;; *) : ;; esac; exit 0
